items.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs first round schedule television results
items.description: The 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs are underway. Here is the complete schedule for the first round of the playoffs, including TV information and results:

items.headline: Martin St. Louis Montreal Canadiens Seinfeld comfort TV show
items.description:
Now here’s a story about nothing.
Montreal Canadiens head coach Martin St. Louis revealed Saturday that his comfort TV show is the iconic 90s sitcom, “Seinfeld.”
“To me, ‘Seinfeld’ is the show that can let me disconnect from everything,” St. Louis told reporters.
“It’s a show about nothing,” he added

items.headline: Vegas coach Tortorella says team needs arrogance in Game 4 against Utah
items.description:
SALT LAKE CITY -- When John Tortorella took over as Vegas Golden Knights coach on March 29, he used a positive approach to snap them out of an 8-15-4 funk. They went on a 7-0-1 run down the stretch.

items.headline: Tampa Bay Lightning defense stepping up without Victor Hedman in first round
items.description:
MONTREAL -- The Tampa Bay Lightning are doing their best to handle the absence of Victor Hedman, but competing without their top defenseman during the Stanley Cup Playoffs has added a significant challenge.

items.description:

items.headline: Montreal not worried about top line entering Game 4 of NHL playoffs against Tampa Bay
items.description:

items.headline: Carolina Hurricanes Nikolaj Ehlers injury status update April 25, 2026
items.description:
OTTAWA -- Nikolaj Ehlers did not play for the Carolina Hurricanes in Game 4 of the Eastern Conference First Round against the Ottawa Senators at Canadian Tire Centre on Saturday because of a lower-body injury.

items.description:

items.headline: Minnesota Wild seek spark from Kirill Kaprizov, power play in Game 4
items.description:
ST. PAUL, Minn. -- The Minnesota Wild have matched the Dallas Stars stride for stride at even strength in the Western Conference First Round, meeting the physical demands and pace through three games of a rugged best-of-7 series in the Stanley Cup Playoffs.
